title: rigiolepis uniflora
intro: Rigiolepis uniflora, also known as the single-flowered Rigiolepis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Achariaceae. It is primarily found in the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent, making it beneficial for treating conditions such as hypertension and rheumatism. Rigiolepis uniflora is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and roots of the plant in hot water.
